hardware.expected_machine: Ubuntu + NVIDIA RTX 4060 Ti + Intel Core Ultra 9 285K

training_size_preset_info.notes: First serious full-performance run for RTX 4060 Ti class hardware.

full.notes: First serious full-performance run for RTX 4060 Ti class hardware.

rainbow_run_variant_info.label: E: final-safe full Rainbow, n_step=3, NoisyNet ON, all400 + proxy reward

A.label: A: ConvNeXtTiny + Double + Dueling + PER + C51, n_step=1, NoisyNet OFF

B.label: B: ConvNeXtTiny + Double + Dueling + PER + C51, n_step=3, NoisyNet OFF

C.label: C: ConvNeXtTiny + Double + Dueling + PER + C51, n_step=1, NoisyNet ON

D.label: D: ConvNeXtTiny full Rainbow, n_step=3, NoisyNet ON

E.label: E: final-safe full Rainbow, n_step=3, NoisyNet ON, all400 + proxy reward

model_experiment_profile_info.label: Proxy-shaped reward: all 400 maps with tap-success and pig-like score bonuses

baseline_compat.label: Baseline-compatible: filtered maps, square resize, legacy score-delta reward

reward_fix_v1.label: Reward fix: guard score resets and reward per-level best-score improvements

allmap_reward_v1.label: All-map reward run: all 400 maps with guarded score-delta reward

proxy_reward_v1.label: Proxy-shaped reward: all 400 maps with tap-success and pig-like score bonuses

classic_conv.notes: Original project stem. Input convention is 0..1 after env.preprocess().

convnext_tiny_pretrained.notes: Chosen current run. Keeps output shape compatible with DQN Q-head.

convnext_tiny_scratch.type: Keras/TensorFlow ConvNeXtTiny stem without ImageNet weights
convnext_tiny_scratch.notes: Same architecture but random visual features; usually worse for limited RL data.

convnext_tiny_pretrained_finetune.notes: Higher capacity, slower, more overfitting/instability risk.

keras_convnextv2_style_scratch.notes: Discussed, but not added because pretrained ConvNeXtTiny is safer.

pytorch_timm_convnextv2_pretrained.notes: Dummy-tested only. Not safe for TensorFlow SavedModel evaluation path.

dueling_dqn.notes: Current default; outputs scalar Q-values with shape (batch, 200).

vanilla_dqn.notes: Smaller baseline; outputs scalar Q-values with shape (batch, 200).

noisy_dueling_dqn.notes: Scalar-Q NoisyNet ablation. full_rainbow is the complete Rainbow preset.

c51_distributional.notes: A/B ablation head. Dueling C51 without NoisyNet; Agent still uses true Double DQN target.

full_rainbow.type: Rainbow DQN head: dueling C51 with NoisyDense
full_rainbow.notes: C/D head. Dueling C51 with NoisyNet; Agent uses true Double DQN target and PER.

iqn.notes: More advanced than C51; too large for the current compatibility path.

fqf.type: learned quantile fraction distributional RL head
fqf.notes: More advanced than IQN; not suitable for this quick project path.

DQN.notes: Scalar-Q path remains available through dueling_dqn / vanilla_dqn presets.

target_network.notes: target_learner exists and syncs every target_sync_period.

Double_DQN.notes: A/B/C/D select next action with online network and evaluate it with target network.

Dueling_DQN.notes: DoubleQNetwork splits V(state) and A(state, action).

Prioritized_Replay.notes: ReplayMemory samples by priority and updates priorities from TD error.

n_step_return.notes: Replay supports n_step; selected run uses n_step=3.

Rainbow_DQN.notes: A/B/C/D run matrix toggles n_step and NoisyNet; D is the closest full Rainbow run.

NoisyNet.notes: Selected run uses sigma0=0.5; paper-style NoisyNet uses sigma0=0.5 and epsilon=0.

Agent57.notes: Too large for this project path.

SAC_TD3.notes: Continuous-control methods; not natural for 200 discrete actions.

MuZero.notes: Would require latent dynamics and planning/MCTS.

run_metadata.current_honest_name: E: final-safe full Rainbow, n_step=3, NoisyNet ON, all400 + proxy reward
run_metadata.target_direction: ConvNeXt-based Rainbow DQN A/B/C/D ablation matrix
run_metadata.not_implemented_warning: IQN/FQF, R2D2, NGU, Agent57, PPO, SAC/TD3, Dreamer, and MuZero are listed for transparency but are not active in this run.
